title: Strange World
description: The Horror Project of Mod - Strange World
body:
# 🌑 Strange World

**Something is watching you. The world is not what it seems.**

Strange World is a psychological horror mod that gradually transforms your Minecraft experience from a peaceful adventure into a terrifying nightmare. At the center of it all is **Jerry** — a mysterious chat entity who starts as your best friend... and slowly becomes your worst fear.

---

## ⚠️ Content Warning

This mod contains:
- **Loud and sudden sounds**
- **Jumpscares and frightening imagery**
- **Disturbing chat messages**
- **Psychological horror elements**
- **Hostile world changes**
- **Screen glitch effects and camera shake**

A warning screen is displayed when you first enter a world. **Privacy Mode** is available to disable browser history reading.

---

## 🎭 The Four Phases of Jerry

### Phase 0 — Friendly *(0–3 minutes)*
> *"Hey! A new player! Welcome to this world!"*

Jerry greets you warmly. He's helpful, cheerful, and acts like a good companion. He warns you about nearby hostile mobs, helps you find diamonds, and cheers you on. Everything feels... normal.

### Phase 1 — Suspicious *(3–8 minutes)*
> *"Do you ever feel like someone is watching us?"*

Something shifts. Jerry's messages become unsettling. He mentions things he shouldn't know. He counts blocks that don't add up. A mysterious **Watcher** — a figure that looks like Steve — appears in the distance. If you look at it... it plays a cave sound and vanishes.

### Phase 2 — Strange *(8–15 minutes)*
> *"W-what's happening to me?! The sky... THE SKY IS BLEEDING"*

Jerry's name begins to glitch: **Jer██y**. The rain turns **blood red**. Water becomes dark crimson — even underwater. A **10-second glitch event** triggers immediately: screen shakes, distorted sound plays, glitched text floods the chat and screen. If Jerry finds diamonds near you, he **deletes them** from the world.

### Phase 3 — Hostile *(15+ minutes)*
> *"Jerry is dead. I am what remains."*

**Jer%&$?** has fully taken over. All passive mobs — cows, pigs, sheep, chickens — **attack you on sight**. The blood rain is permanent. The chat fills with threats and glitched binary. If Privacy Mode is off... Jerry reads your **real browser history** from Chrome, Firefox, Edge, or Brave and displays it in chat.

---

## 📺 Glitch Events

A terrifying 10-second glitch event triggers **immediately when Phase 2 begins**, then repeats **every 10 minutes** during Phases 2–3:

- 🔊 **Custom distorted sound effect**
- 📷 **Violent camera shaking**
- 💬 **Chat spam** — gibberish, binary code, Caesar cipher messages
- 🟣 **Colored rectangles** flashing across the screen (purple, black, white, red)
- 📺 **Scan lines and screen flashes**
- ✨ **Glitch text overlay** — `JERRY`, `HELP`, `01101010`, `ERROR`
- 🖤 **Dark vignette border**

---

## 👤 Entities

### The Watcher
A custom entity with Steve's skin that spawns **40–70 blocks away** during Phase 1. It stands perfectly still and stares. Look directly at it — **cave sound** plays and it instantly **vanishes**.

### The Shadow
A **completely black figure** that spawns **10–20 blocks** from you in **all phases**. When you look at it:
- It lets out a **Warden roar**
- **Charges at you** at extreme speed
- On contact — **teleports you to the Strange Field**
- Spawn egg available in the Strange World creative tab

---

## 🌾 Strange Field — Custom Dimension

An **endless flat field of fully-grown wheat** stretching to the horizon. No mobs. No trees. Just wheat, dirt paths every 32 blocks, and silence.

- **Wet farmland** — wheat never breaks
- **Water layer** beneath the soil
- **Eternal daytime** (fixed at noon)
- **No mob spawns** — completely empty
- **Jerry is paused** while you're here — no messages, no phase progression

### 🗼 Exit Tower
Tall **deepslate brick towers** scattered across the field with a guaranteed one at **(160, 160)**:
- **30 blocks tall**, 7×7 base
- **4 arched doorways** on all sides
- **Spiral staircase** with wall torches
- **Glass windows** every 6 floors
- **Pyramidal deepslate tile roof** with corner spires
- **10-block sea lantern beacon** — visible from far away
- **Return Gate** on top — teleports you to your bed or world spawn
- **Soul lanterns** at ground level around the base

---

## 💬 Context-Aware Dialogue

Jerry doesn't just talk randomly — he **reacts to what you do**:

| Action | Jerry's Reaction |
|--------|-----------------|
| Diamonds nearby (Phase 0) | *"Oh! I found diamonds for you! One of them is 12 blocks away!"* |
| Hostile mob nearby (Phase 0) | *"Be careful! Don't die to the mobs!"* |
| Place 25 blocks | *"What are you building? Will you show me? :)"* |
| Break 100 blocks | *"Trying to craft something? Well, let's see :)"* |
| Break 500 blocks | *"You don't want to hide from me, do you?"* |
| Rain starts (Phase 1) | *"Don't you think the rain tastes like... iron?"* |
| Swimming (Phase 1) | *"I thought the water was supposed to be red..."* |
| Diamonds nearby (Phase 2) | Deletes all diamond ore within 30 blocks |

---

## 🏗️ Structures

### 🏚️ Abandoned House
Weathered houses with **peaked spruce roofs**, oak log frames, mossy walls with holes, glass pane windows, door frames, cobweb-filled interiors, and a chest containing a **mysterious note** from a previous player who encountered Jerry.

### ⛺ Tent Village
Camps of 2–6 wool tents around a central **campfire** with log seats. Each tent adapts to terrain height — no floating! Connected by **dirt paths**. Each tent has a lantern, red carpet floor, and a chest with **survivor's logs** documenting encounters with Jerry, plus iron/diamond gear, golden apples, and rarely a full **netherite set** (2%) or **enchanted golden apple** (5%).

### 💓 Flesh Heart
A massive flat heart shape made of **rotten flesh blocks** with a glowing **redstone + glowstone core**, **arteries** spreading outward, **redstone wire veins**, **weeping vines**, blood pools, and crimson nylium accents. Touching the flesh causes **nausea**.

### 🏰 Ancient Castle *(rare)*
A large 30×30 stone brick fortress featuring:
- **Thick walls with battlements** and walkways
- **4 corner towers** with peaked dark oak roofs and lanterns
- **Grand arched gate** with iron bar portcullis
- **Courtyard** with a well
- **Throne room** — pillars, red carpet, chandeliers, quartz throne, banners
- **Storage wing** — 20 chests with iron, diamonds, ender pearls, golden apples, and rarely **netherite gear**. Chests may contain **Jerry's Key** (30% per chest).
- Throne chest contains a **Royal Decree** with **real coordinates** to the Decayed Creature (found via `/locate`).

### 💀 Decayed Creature *(rare)*
A massive collapsed organic monstrosity (22×18 blocks) featuring:
- **Multi-layered body** rising 4 blocks at center
- **Bone block skull** with eye sockets
- **Spine** running the full length, **6 pairs of ribs**
- **4 sprawled limbs**, red nether brick veins, crying obsidian accents
- **Sealed Core** at the heart — use Jerry's Key here to end it all.

---

## 📜 Starter Note

When you first enter a world, you receive a **"Mysterious Note"** with the **real coordinates** of the nearest Ancient Castle. This begins the quest to find Jerry's Key and end his reign.

---

## 🔑 The Key & The Ending

Find **Jerry's Key** in the Castle's storage chests. Locate the **Decayed Creature** using the Royal Decree from the throne. Use the key on the **Sealed Core**.

A dramatic **42-second cinematic sequence** unfolds — one message at a time:

Jerry panics. He begs. He apologizes. Then, line by line, the system **deletes him** — his class files, his config, his rain, his mob AI. The rain stops. The water clears. The world is restored.

**Jerry is permanently dead in that world.** Saved to the world file forever.

*...or is he?*

---

## 🧱 Custom Content

| Item | Description |
|------|-------------|
| **Rotten Flesh Block** | Organic block with slime sounds. Causes **nausea** on contact. |
| **Sealed Core** | Indestructible glowing block. Use Jerry's Key to activate. |
| **Return Gate** | Black block with blue glow. Teleports back to Overworld. |
| **Jerry's Key** | Golden key found in Castle chests. The only way to kill Jerry. |
| **Watcher Spawn Egg** | Black spawn egg for The Watcher entity. |
| **Shadow Spawn Egg** | Dark purple spawn egg for The Shadow entity. |

All items available in the **Strange World** creative tab.

---

## 🎮 Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/phase 0` | Set phase to Friendly |
| `/phase 1` | Set phase to Suspicious |
| `/phase 2` | Set phase to Strange (triggers glitch + blood rain) |
| `/phase 3` | Set phase to Hostile (mobs attack, full chaos) |
| `/locate structure strangeworld:abandoned_house` | Find nearest house |
| `/locate structure strangeworld:tent_village` | Find nearest tent camp |
| `/locate structure strangeworld:flesh_heart` | Find nearest flesh heart |
| `/locate structure strangeworld:castle` | Find nearest castle |
| `/locate structure strangeworld:decayed_creature` | Find nearest creature |

`/phase` requires operator permissions (level 2).

---

## 📋 Technical Details

- **Minecraft:** 1.19.2
- **Mod Loader:** Fabric
- **Dependencies:** Fabric API
- **Phase progress saves** to the world file — persists across sessions
- **Privacy Mode** toggle on warning screen (enabled by default)
- All Overworld structures use **Minecraft's native worldgen system** — fully compatible with `/locate`
- **Strange Field** — custom dimension with flat generator + chunk decoration
- Client/server sync via custom network packets
- **Real browser history** reading (Chrome, Firefox, Edge, Brave, Chromium)
- Optimized block scanning with cooldowns — no lag spikes
- Phase pauses automatically when player is in the Strange Field

---

## ⬇️ Installation

1. Install **Fabric Loader** for Minecraft 1.19.2
2. Install **Fabric API**
3. Drop `strange-world-1.2.5.jar` into your `mods/` folder
4. Launch the game
5. Trust Jerry. He's your friend.

*...for now.*
